name: vaex
tagline: Reference guide for using the Vaex library to process, analyze, and visualize out-of-core tabular datasets larger than RAM in Python.
verdict: Solid, well-scoped reference skill: clear trigger description, runnable code examples, bulky detail split into six reference files. No security issues found. Weak spots: install commands are unpinned (minor supply-chain risk), and no guidance for handling failed installs, build issues, or missing files.

highlights.summary: `uv pip install vaex` / vaex-core,vaex-viz,vaex-hdf5,vaex-ml are well-known PyPI packages but installed unpinned, no version constraint given.
No failure-path guidance: install/build issues (e.g. Windows annoy dep), missing files, or version mismatches lack any fallback or stop-and-report step.
